title: Scrumbles Calming Krunchies Cat Treats
features: Natural Calming Ingredients: A sprinkle of valerian and chamomile in every bite to naturally support relaxation
Crispy-Soft Texture: A texture cats love, combining crunch with softness in every bite
100% Natural: No artificial nonsense, just wholesome, quality ingredients
Gut-Friendly Goodness: Includes added pumpkin and yeast to support healthy digestion
Sensitive Stomach Friendly: Gluten-free and hypoallergenic for all cats to enjoy
